response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud-based AI deployment at scale — key requirements for this staff-level role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and community contributions
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or production AI system deployment
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI integration projects
